Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component

Class AbstractDiscoveryComponent

java.lang.Object
org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.GenericHstComponent
org.hippoecm.hst.component.support.bean.BaseHstComponent
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component.AbstractDiscoveryComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstComponent
Direct Known Subclasses:
DiscoveryCategoryComponent, DiscoveryCategoryHighlightComponent, DiscoveryFacetComponent, DiscoveryProductDetailComponent, DiscoveryProductGridComponent, DiscoveryProductHighlightComponent, DiscoveryRecommendationComponent, DiscoverySearchComponent
public abstract class AbstractDiscoveryComponent extends org.hippoecm.hst.component.support.bean.BaseHstComponent
Base class for Discovery HST components. Provides typed service lookup, bean path resolution, and int-parsing utilities.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static final record 
    AbstractDiscoveryComponent.DataSourceResult
    Holds the result of resolveDataSource(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest, java.lang.String): the optional search/category result and whether a matching data-source component is wired to the given label.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Optional<String>
    backfillProductDetailPid(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String label)
    When the PDP component has not yet run (consumer-before-producer or PPR mode), locates the DiscoveryProductDetailComponent config from the page tree and extracts the PID via two-stage resolution: Document picker path → bean → productId field URL param name stored in component config (default: "pid") Returns Optional.empty() when no matching producer is found on the page or when no PID can be resolved.
    protected Optional<SearchResponse>
    backfillSearchResponse(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String label)
    When the request cache is empty (consumer ran before producer, or PPR mode), locates the producer's component config from the page tree, re-runs the API call with its stored parameters, and populates the cache so subsequent components get a cache hit.

    blankToNull(String s)
     
    void
    doBeforeRender(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstResponse response)
    Sets editMode on the FTL model once, before every component renders.

    Named accessor for the HST Discovery service bean.

    getPublicRequestParameterAsInt(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String param, int defaultValue)
    Reads a public URL parameter and parses it as an int, falling back to defaultValue if absent or unparseable.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractDiscoveryComponent

      public AbstractDiscoveryComponent()

  • Method Details

    • doBeforeRender

      public void doBeforeRender(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstResponse response) throws org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstComponentException
      Sets editMode on the FTL model once, before every component renders. All brxdis templates use (editMode!false) so this guarantees a non-null value without any per-component boilerplate.
      Specified by:
      doBeforeRender in interface org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstComponent
      Overrides:
      doBeforeRender in class org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.GenericHstComponent
      Throws:
      org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstComponentException

    • lookupService

      protected <T> T lookupService(Class<T> type)

    • getHippoBeanForPath

      protected <T extends org.hippoecm.hst.content.beans.standard.HippoBean> T getHippoBeanForPath(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String path, Class<T> beanClass)
      Resolves a site-content-relative path to a typed content bean. Mirrors CommonComponent.getHippoBeanForPath() but takes the current request explicitly so tests can mock it without a live HST container.

    • warnIfMissingDataSource

      protected void warnIfMissingDataSource(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, boolean resultEmpty, String label)
      Sets a CMS-preview diagnostic warning when the named data source is absent from cache. No-op in live delivery mode.

    • warnIfMissingDataSource

      protected void warnIfMissingDataSource(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, boolean resultEmpty, String dataSource, String label)

    • blankToNull

      protected static String blankToNull(String s)

    • isBandConfiguredOnPage

      protected boolean isBandConfiguredOnPage(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String label)
      Walks the page's HST component configuration tree to check whether a data component with the matching band is actually configured on this page. Uses the in-memory config model — no JCR reads.

    • isBandConfiguredOnPage

      protected boolean isBandConfiguredOnPage(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String label, Class<?> dataComponentClass)

    • backfillSearchResponse

      protected Optional<SearchResponse> backfillSearchResponse(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String label)
      When the request cache is empty (consumer ran before producer, or PPR mode), locates the producer's component config from the page tree, re-runs the API call with its stored parameters, and populates the cache so subsequent components get a cache hit.

      Returns Optional.empty() when no matching producer is found on the page or when the fetch fails (exception is logged as WARN).

    • backfillProductDetailPid

      protected Optional<String> backfillProductDetailPid(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String label)
      When the PDP component has not yet run (consumer-before-producer or PPR mode), locates the DiscoveryProductDetailComponent config from the page tree and extracts the PID via two-stage resolution:
      1. Document picker path → bean → productId field
      2. URL param name stored in component config (default: "pid")
      Returns Optional.empty() when no matching producer is found on the page or when no PID can be resolved.

    • parseStatsFields

      protected static List<String> parseStatsFields(String value)

    • resolveDataSource

      protected AbstractDiscoveryComponent.DataSourceResult resolveDataSource(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String label)
      Shared data-source resolution used by view components (ProductGrid, Facets). Probes the request cache for search and category results, backfills from the page's component tree on cache miss, and sets label / labelConnected on the model. Also emits a CMS-preview warning when no data source is wired.

    • isEditMode

      protected boolean isEditMode(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request)
      Returns true when rendered inside the Channel Manager / Experience Editor. Mirrors CommonComponent "editMode" semantics so customers who previously extended CommonComponent find the same named helper here.

    • isIsolatedComponentRender

      protected boolean isIsolatedComponentRender(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request)
      Returns true when this is an isolated component re-render triggered by Channel Manager (PPR). The signal is a non-null componentRenderingWindowReferenceNamespace on the base URL. On a full-page preview load the namespace is null → method returns false.

    • getPublicRequestParameterAsInt

      protected int getPublicRequestParameterAsInt(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest request, String param, int defaultValue)
      Reads a public URL parameter and parses it as an int, falling back to defaultValue if absent or unparseable. Mirrors CommonComponent.getAnyIntParameter(request, param, default).

    • getDiscoveryService

      protected HstDiscoveryService getDiscoveryService()
      Named accessor for the HST Discovery service bean. Prefer this over the raw lookupService(HstDiscoveryService.class) call.

    • parseIntOrDefault

      protected static int parseIntOrDefault(String value, int defaultValue)
